[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101010000 3
1 0000001101 3
2 0000000100 1
3 0010001000 2
4 0101010000 3
5 0000001101 3
6 0000000100 1
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0001000001 2
12 21 0000000001 1
23 32 0000000100 1 match 2 6
34 43 0000000100 1 match 2 6
45 54 0110000100 3
56 65 0001000100 2
67 76 0001000110 3
70 07 0011000000 2

02 20 0000001001 2
13 31 0000010000 1
24 42 0000001100 2
35 53 0000010100 2
46 64 0000001100 2
57 75 0011000100 3
60 06 0001001001 3
71 17 0001000010 2

03 30 0000000000 a match 7
14 41 0100000000 1
25 52 0000000100 1 match 2 6
36 63 0000000100 1 match 2 6
47 74 0010000100 2
50 05 0011100000 3
61 16 0001000011 3
72 27 0000000100 1 match 2 6

04 40 0010001000 2 match 3
15 51 0101010000 3 match 0 4
26 62 0000001101 3 match 1 5
37 73 0000000100 1 match 2 6
